completed_tasks.name: Build Phase 28 UAT artifact from current verification evidence
Re-run blocked verification checks to separate external blockers from repo defects
completed_tasks.progress: Confirmed `docker compose config`, backend targeted tests, frontend Jest provider tests, and frontend production build pass. Confirmed `scripts/demo/smoke.sh` is still blocked by Docker Desktop not starting. Confirmed `npm run test:e2e` fails independently because Playwright discovers a Jest unit test file.

remaining_tasks.name: Narrow Playwright discovery so `npm run test:e2e` runs only the browser proof
Once Docker Desktop is healthy, rerun `scripts/demo/smoke.sh` and the Playwright browser proof to close Phase 28 verification

blockers.description: Local Docker daemon still fails with `Docker Desktop is unable to start`, so the Compose-backed smoke test cannot boot the demo stack.
blockers.workaround: None in-repo. Docker Desktop must be brought back to a healthy running state before `scripts/demo/smoke.sh` can pass.

blockers.description: The `npm run test:e2e` command is broken in-repo because Playwright discovers `tests/rulestead-web-provider.test.ts` and crashes on `jest is not defined` before browser automation starts.
blockers.workaround: Restrict Playwright discovery to `*.spec.ts` or explicitly target `demo-toggle.spec.ts`, or move Jest unit tests out of Playwright's `testDir`.

human_actions_pending.action: Start Docker Desktop successfully and verify the daemon responds to `docker info`.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 28 smoke verification is blocked before containers build or start.

decisions.decision: Recorded Phase 28 verification in shift-left UAT mode instead of conversational human-UAT.
decisions.rationale: The phase already had executable verification evidence for most checks; only two real gaps remained.

decisions.decision: Split the remaining verification blockers into external runtime failure and repo-local Playwright misconfiguration.
decisions.rationale: The Playwright failure is actionable without Docker and should be fixed independently before final reruns.

uncommitted_files: multiple generated `_build`, `doc`, and `.DS_Store` artifacts already present in the dirty worktree
next_action: First fix `examples/demo/frontend/playwright.config.ts` so `npm run test:e2e` runs only the browser spec. Then rerun that command. Separately, once Docker Desktop is healthy, rerun `scripts/demo/smoke.sh` and update `28-UAT.md`, roadmap, and state.
context_notes: Phase 28 implementation is complete. Verification is the only remaining work. The repo worktree is very dirty and includes lots of generated/build artifacts unrelated to the handoff; do not assume they were created by this pause flow or try to clean them indiscriminately. The highest-signal gap is Playwright's overly broad discovery pattern. Docker remains an external blocker.
